name: Breakout Momentum
summary: Buy on high-volume breakouts above a defined resistance level.
summary_zh: 在放量突破关键阻力位时买入。
description: Enter when price closes above a multi-week resistance level on above-average volume. The thesis is that a clean breakout attracts continuation buyers. Size positions so a stop just below the breakout level risks no more than 1% of account equity.
description_zh: 当价格在高于均量的成交量下收于多周阻力位之上时入场。逻辑是一次干净的突破会吸引追随买盘。仓位规模应使止损设在突破位下方时，单笔风险不超过账户权益的 1%。
rules: Entry: close above resistance on >1.5x average volume
Exit: trailing stop under the most recent higher low
Stop: hard stop just below the breakout level
rules_zh: 入场：以高于 1.5 倍均量的成交量收于阻力位之上
出场：在最近一个更高低点下方设移动止损
止损：在突破位正下方设硬止损

name: Mean Reversion Swing
summary: Fade short-term extremes back toward a moving-average mean.
summary_zh: 在短期极端价位回归均线时反向介入。
description: Short extended names that are stretched far above their 20-day moving average, or buy names stretched far below. Targets a reversion to the mean over a few days. Best in range-bound, non-trending markets.
description_zh: 做空远高于 20 日均线、过度拉伸的标的，或买入远低于均线的标的，目标是数日内回归均值。最适合震荡、无明显趋势的市场。
rules: Entry: price > 2 standard deviations from the 20-day mean
Exit: price touches the 20-day moving average
Stop: a further 1 standard deviation against the position
rules_zh: 入场：价格偏离 20 日均值超过 2 个标准差
出场：价格触及 20 日均线
止损：价格再朝不利方向运行 1 个标准差

name: Trend Following
summary: Ride established uptrends using moving-average alignment.
summary_zh: 借助均线多头排列顺势持有上升趋势。
description: Hold positions while the 20/50/200-day moving averages stay stacked in bullish order. Add on pullbacks to the 20-day. A patient strategy with longer holding periods and fewer trades.
description_zh: 在 20/50/200 日均线保持多头排列期间持有仓位，回调至 20 日均线时加仓。这是一种持有周期较长、交易频率较低的耐心策略。
rules: Entry: pullback to rising 20-day while 50 > 200
Exit: close below the 50-day moving average
Stop: close below the 200-day moving average
rules_zh: 入场：50 日均线在 200 日均线之上，且价格回调至向上的 20 日均线
出场：收盘跌破 50 日均线
止损：收盘跌破 200 日均线

name: Earnings Gap
summary: Trade the post-earnings reaction in the first session or two.
summary_zh: 在财报发布后的头一两个交易日内交易其反应。
description: Enter the morning after an earnings report when price gaps in the direction of the surprise and holds the opening range. High variance — keep size small and exits fast.
description_zh: 在财报公布次日早盘，当价格沿超预期方向跳空并守住开盘区间时入场。波动极大——保持小仓位、快速离场。
rules: Entry: gap holds above the opening 30-minute range
Exit: same-day or next-day on momentum stall
Stop: loss of the opening range low
rules_zh: 入场：跳空后守住开盘前 30 分钟区间上沿
出场：动能停滞时当日或次日了结
止损：跌破开盘区间下沿

name: Dividend Value Hold
summary: Hold undervalued dividend payers for longer-term mean reversion.
summary_zh: 长期持有被低估的高股息股票，等待价值回归。
description: Accumulate quality dividend payers trading below historical valuation multiples. Long holding period with income while waiting for re-rating. Lowest turnover strategy in the library.
description_zh: 在估值倍数低于历史水平时分批买入优质高股息标的，长期持有以获取股息收入并等待估值修复。这是库内换手率最低的策略。
rules: Entry: P/E below 5-year average with stable payout
Exit: valuation re-rates to fair value
Stop: dividend cut or thesis break
rules_zh: 入场：市盈率低于五年均值且派息稳定
出场：估值修复至合理价值
止损：减派股息或逻辑被破坏

name: Crypto Momentum
summary: Momentum continuation on liquid crypto proxies and majors.
summary_zh: 在流动性高的加密主流币上做动量延续。
description: Buy strength in liquid crypto names breaking to new local highs. Highly volatile — use smaller position sizes and wider stops to account for 24/7 swings.
description_zh: 在流动性高、突破阶段性新高的加密标的上追强势。波动极高——采用更小仓位与更宽止损，以应对 7×24 小时的波动。
rules: Entry: break to a new 10-day high
Exit: trailing stop on a 3-day low
Stop: fixed percentage stop sized for volatility
rules_zh: 入场：突破 10 日新高
出场：以 3 日低点设移动止损
止损：按波动率设定的固定百分比止损

name: Sector ETF Rotation
summary: Rotate into the strongest sector ETFs on a monthly cadence.
summary_zh: 按月轮动到表现最强的板块 ETF。
description: Rank sector and index ETFs by trailing relative strength and hold the leaders. Rebalance monthly. A diversified, lower-volatility approach with broad-market holdings.
description_zh: 按过去一段时间的相对强度对板块与指数 ETF 排名并持有领先者，每月再平衡。这是一种持仓分散、波动较低、覆盖大盘的方法。
rules: Entry: top-quartile trailing 3-month relative strength
Exit: drops out of the top half on monthly review
Stop: broad-market regime turns risk-off
rules_zh: 入场：过去 3 个月相对强度位列前四分之一
出场：月度复盘时跌出前二分之一
止损：大盘环境转为避险

name: Oversold Bounce
summary: Buy short-term oversold dips in otherwise strong names.
summary_zh: 在原本强势的标的中买入短期超卖回调。
description: Buy quality uptrending names when a fast oscillator hits oversold on a multi-day pullback. Targets a quick bounce over a few days rather than a long hold.
description_zh: 当快速摆动指标在多日回调中进入超卖时，买入处于上升趋势的优质标的。目标是数日内的快速反弹，而非长期持有。
rules: Entry: RSI(2) oversold within a longer-term uptrend
Exit: bounce into the prior swing high or 3-5 day target
Stop: a close below the recent pullback low
rules_zh: 入场：长期上升趋势中 RSI(2) 进入超卖
出场：反弹至前高或达到 3–5 日目标
止损：收盘跌破近期回调低点
